cards.back: A type of finite automaton where each state can transition to at most one next state for a given input symbol
A type of finite automaton where each state can transition to multiple next states for a given input symbol
A method of searching for a pattern in a text by constructing a finite automaton that accepts the pattern and checking if the automaton accepts the text
A special type of transition in a finite automaton where the automaton can stay in the same state even if the input symbol is not read
A type of nondeterministic finite automaton that allows for epsilon-transitions
